response.justification: The candidate has a strong, diverse engineering background spanning 15+ years with notable open-source contributions (GISCollective) and Linux familiarity, which aligns with parts of the role. However, several hard requirements are not met: German is listed as only Basic (the role requires C1 minimum), Python is absent from the skills list, and UML/formal modeling expertise is not demonstrated. Leadership experience is largely implicit through senior IC roles rather than explicit team-lead or head-of-development positions, making this a poor fit for an executive-level leadership posting.
strengths: Strong open-source founder experience with GISCollective on Linux/Kubernetes
Broad senior-level engineering history across web, embedded, and data-intensive systems
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 minimum hard requirement
No Python, UML, or formal IT-architecture modeling skills shown
No explicit head-of-development, tech-lead, or team-management role on record
